role: Member of Technical Staff (AI Software Engineer, Multimodal)
hero_headline: Multimodal is where agents stop reading and start seeing. I built this page 11 minutes after the role posted.
hero_subline: Perplexity is turning search into an answer engine that reasons over text, images and voice at once. I ship realtime voice agents and multi-agent systems in production, not demos.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: take one multimodal query path, image plus text in and a cited answer out, wrap it in an eval harness, and ship a measurable latency or accuracy win on a real surface, not a notebook.

jd_match.requirement: Build multimodal AI features spanning text, images and voice for real users
jd_match.proof: I build realtime voice agents on the OpenAI Realtime API and run empresaAI, a 7-agent system that turns email into shipped, deployed apps over a file-based bus.

jd_match.requirement: Own the eval loop and ship production AI with measured outcomes
jd_match.proof: I embedded LLMs into the recruiter workflow at Eurofirms (TOP-3 EU staffing) and measured the result, not the demo.

jd_match.requirement: Strong Python with TypeScript and comfort across the full stack
jd_match.proof: Python and TypeScript daily across empresaAI and ManoloBot; Next.js, Vercel and Supabase end to end.

jd_match.requirement: Move fast from prototype to production
jd_match.proof: ManoloBot ships one Next.js app per day from follower ideas, each deployed to Vercel and validated with Playwright before it goes live.
